name: Super Arcade Boy in Goodbye Greenies
short_description: Super Arcade Boy returns in a retro shoot ’em up with 8 levels, waves of Greenies, power-ups, and 8 big boss battles. Talk with the alien leader—then save the planet.
detailed_description:
SUPER ARCADE BOY IS BACK!

Classic shoot ’em up action returns—blast through nonstop waves of Greenies and take down massive bosses.

Super Arcade Boy returns for the second installment, bringing classic arcade shooting and a fresh alien threat. Fight across 8 challenging levels, power up your ship, and face 8 huge bosses that demand quick dodges and steady aim. Between the chaos, enjoy funny conversations with the alien leader you’re destined to defeat—then save the planet from a full-scale invasion.

Features

  • 8 challenging levels

  • 8 big boss battles

  • Waves of Greenies to blast through

  • Power-ups to boost your firepower

  • Funny conversations with the alien leader

  • Retro-style classic shoot ’em up action

  • Crisp HD visuals

  • Arcade-style quick matches

  • Gamepad support

It’s time to tell these Greenies GOODBYE.
